title: Annual ROC Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Expert annual ROC filing in Mumbai. AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, compliance packages. Avoid MCA penalties. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for annual ROC filing services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides end-to-end ROC annual compliance in Mumbai — AOC-4, MGT-7/MGT-7A, DIR-3 KYC, ADT-1, and all event-based filings with the Registrar of Companies, Mumbai.

What is Annual ROC Filing Service Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  AOC-4 filing with financial statements, Board's Report, and Auditor's Report — filed within 30 days of AGM with ROC Mumbai. MGT-7/MGT-7A annual return with shareholding pattern, director changes, and compliance certification — filed within 60 days of AGM. DIR-3 KYC for all directors (annual deadline: 30 September). ADT-1 for auditor appointment/reappointment. Preparation of Board meeting minutes, AGM minutes, and all necessary resolutions. Annual compliance calendar customised to your company's financial year and AGM date. Remediation of any backlog filings from prior years.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for ROC Filing in Mumbai
  Mumbai has the highest concentration of registered companies in India, and ROC Mumbai is one of the busiest registrars. Late filings attract Rs 100/day/form with no cap — companies with 2-3 years of backlog face penalties exceeding Rs 2 lakhs. Virtual Auditor's compliance management ensures every deadline is met. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) provides both the financial expertise and company secretarial compliance under one engagement. Our Goregaon West office handles all ROC Mumbai coordination. We serve Pvt Ltd companies, OPCs, Section 8 companies, and producer companies with tailored annual compliance packages.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Compliance audit — review MCA master data, identify pending forms, calculate outstanding penalties. Step 2: Financial statement finalisation and Board's Report preparation. Step 3: Board meeting and AGM facilitation with proper notices and resolutions. Step 4: AOC-4 and MGT-7 preparation and filing. Step 5: DIR-3 KYC and any event-based forms. Step 6: Filing confirmation and compliance certificate delivery. Step 7: Next year's compliance calendar setup with automated reminders.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need annual ROC filing in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Affordable annual packages. No missed deadlines.

faqs.q: What is the due date for ROC annual filing?
faqs.a: AOC-4 is due within 30 days of AGM. MGT-7 is due within 60 days of AGM. AGM must be held within 6 months of financial year end (i.e., by 30 September for March year-end companies). DIR-3 KYC is due annually by 30 September.

faqs.q: How much does annual ROC compliance cost in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Our annual compliance packages cover all mandatory filings (AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, ADT-1), Board/AGM minutes, and year-round compliance monitoring. Contact +91-77000 89597 for a fixed-fee quote based on your company's size and complexity.

faqs.q: My company has not filed ROC returns for 2 years. Can you help?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle compliance backlog clearance including filing all overdue forms, calculating and paying additional fees, and applying for condonation of delay if the company faces strike-off proceedings under Section 248.
